programs.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programs.desc: Eight Manchester United football players are killed in a notorious Munich plane crash.

programs.title: Mayday : Air Disaster
programs.desc: Investigators face a major challenge when looters make off with the Flight Data Recorder.

programs.title: Mayday : Air Disaster
programs.desc: The aircraft smashes into a mountaintop and is pulverized on impact instantly killing all 46 people on board.

programs.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programs.desc: John F. Kennedy Jr. is piloting his brand new Piper Saratoga when the aircraft mysteriously disappears.

programs.title: Mayday : Air Disaster
programs.desc: SilkAir Flight 185 is 35,000 feet above the jungles when the plane banks sharply to the right and crashes.

programs.title: Mayday : Air Disaster
programs.desc: American Airlines flight 1572 clips the tops of trees along Peak Mountain Ridge.
